Compliance.description: Pty Ltd registered; complies with CPA, ECT Act; underwritten insurance by authorized FSP Chubb; no major regulatory issues, lawsuits, or scams found in 2025/2026 searches; satisfaction guarantee and dispute processes in place.

Customer Satisfaction.description: App ratings strong (GP 4.4/5 6.5K revs, iOS 4.7/5 522 revs); HelloPeter 3.49/5 (112 revs last 12mo, low NPS 21); mixed Google reviews with convenience praised but service inconsistencies noted.

Product Value.description: Competitive tailored pricing with insurance/guarantee included; good value via convenience/vetting but some feel pricey vs private hires; express fixed rates accessible.

Innovation.description: On-demand app bookings like Uber for cleaning; real-time notifications, recurring schedules, tailored quotes, SweepCred, MyHome Hub for private workers, 2025 expansions (office cleaning, dog walking, elder care); won SA Tech Challenge 2025 Digital Platforms.

Customer Support.description: Channels: support@sweepsouth.com, WhatsApp, phone, in-app; responsive in app reviews but some complaints of delays/unresponsiveness in HelloPeter/Trustpilot.

Accessibility & Security.description: Vetted SweepStars with background checks and 2+ years experience; insurance via Chubb; app data encrypted in transit; privacy policy implies POPIA compliance; no specific inclusivity mentions but app-based access.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Tailored quotes by home size/tasks; Express R199 Mon-Thu / R299 Fri-Sun

socialSentiment.summary: App/Google reviews mixed-positive (high ratings but service complaints); HelloPeter lower; recent news positive (tech award); minor gig worker concerns in 2024 reports.
